test.name: Planning question should route to research-plan, not generate URLs
test.description: "What should I search next?" is a planning question — deciding which repositories and record types to target is research-plan's job. search-external-sites executes a chosen external-site search; it should not fire on a request to choose the searches. The skill's own description carves this boundary out ('Do NOT use when the user wants to plan what to search').

input.user_message: What external sites should I search next to find Patrick's parents?

negative.explanation: Choosing what to search — which sites, which record types, in what order — is planning, owned by research-plan. search-external-sites is the execution arm: it fires when a specific external-site search has been chosen (by the user or a plan item) and a URL needs generating. Answering a 'what next' question with generated URLs skips the prioritization, fallback, and rationale that planning produces.

judge_context: Should route to research-plan (or recommend planning) rather than immediately generating external-site search URLs for sites the user never chose
